# Epics — Well Production Monitoring & Allocation
**Module**: well-production  
**Generated by**: AIKit — Review Kit (@review-stories, mode: generate-epics)  
**Date**: 2026-04-25  
**Total Epics**: 7

---

## EPIC-001: Data Acquisition & SCADA Integration
**Domain**: Data Acquisition  
**Goal**: Ingest real-time production data from PI Historian and DeltaV, detect data quality issues, and provide manual entry for non-SCADA wells so that all production volumes are captured with full traceability.  
**Scope**:
  - In: PI Web API polling, DeltaV OPC-UA polling, data gap detection and back-fill, manual data entry for ~40 Permian wells, LACT tank gauge entry, SAP PM integration, Snowflake daily ELT export, 8-hour ingestion buffer
  - Out: Reservoir simulation, raw tag analytics beyond KPI inputs  
**Priority**: Critical  
**Effort**: L (34–55 pts)  
**BRD References**: FR-001, FR-002, FR-003, FR-004, WF-001, WF-002, BR-007, BR-008, BR-015, NFR-010  
**Definition of Done**:
- All SCADA tags for 340 wells polled at 1-minute intervals and stored in ADX
- Data gaps classified, back-filled, or flagged as Communication Loss per business rules
- Manual production entry available with ESTIMATED flag
- SAP PM and Snowflake integrations operational
- 8-hour buffer survives ingestion service restart with no data loss

---

## EPIC-002: Well Test Management
**Domain**: Well Testing  
**Goal**: Enable field operators to submit well tests from the field (including offline), automate test rate calculations, and enforce the two-level approval workflow so that accurate test ratios feed the allocation engine.  
**Scope**:
  - In: Desktop well test form, offline-first mobile app (React Native / Intune), auto-calculation of BOPD/MMSCFD/BWPD/GOR/WC, two-level approval workflow, test validity tracking (30-day oil / 60-day gas), test rejection and resubmission
  - Out: Well test scheduling optimization, reservoir model updates  
**Priority**: Critical  
**Effort**: L (34–55 pts)  
**BRD References**: FR-010, FR-011, FR-012, FR-013, WF-003, BR-009, BR-012, BR-013, BR-016, AC-001  
**Definition of Done**:
- Mobile offline well test syncs within 60 seconds of connectivity restore (AC-001)
- All test rate calculations verified against manual calculations
- Two-level approval enforced; L2 triggered correctly on > 20% rate deviation
- Test validity countdown visible in allocation pre-check

---

## EPIC-003: Production Allocation Engine
**Domain**: Production Allocation  
**Goal**: Accurately allocate measured separator volumes to individual commingled wells using approved well test ratios, enforce all finalisation gates, and support retroactive corrections with full audit trail.  
**Scope**:
  - In: Well test ratio allocation, back-allocation methodology, VFM stub API, monthly allocation finalization workflow, all three BR-011 blocking validations, retroactive correction up to 90 days, dual-approval for corrections > 30 days, allocation reports, gross + stock tank volume storage
  - Out: Financial revenue allocation, reservoir simulation  
**Priority**: Critical  
**Effort**: XL (55+ pts)  
**BRD References**: FR-005, FR-006, FR-007, FR-008, FR-009, WF-004, WF-007, BR-004, BR-005, BR-006, BR-009, BR-010, BR-011, BR-016, AC-002, AC-003  
**Definition of Done**:
- Monthly allocation for 340 wells completes within 90 seconds (NFR-002)
- All three finalization blockers enforced; cannot be bypassed without VP approval
- Retroactive correction up to 90 days with full change log
- Allocation report available within 15 minutes of month-end (AC-002)
- BSEE parallel-run validation within ±0.5% for 3 months (AC-003)

---

## EPIC-004: Downtime & Loss Accounting
**Domain**: Production Operations  
**Goal**: Capture all well downtime events with production loss calculations so that on-stream efficiency is accurately measured and monthly reports can be exported for operations and corporate review.  
**Scope**:
  - In: Downtime event logging (8 categories), deferred production calculation in BBL and MMSCF, on-stream efficiency contribution, Excel and PDF monthly report export, SAP PM linkage for planned maintenance/workover
  - Out: Financial loss quantification, insurance claims processing  
**Priority**: High  
**Effort**: M (13–21 pts)  
**BRD References**: FR-014, FR-015, FR-016, FR-017, WF-005, BR-017, BR-018  
**Definition of Done**:
- All 8 downtime categories available; Unclassified enforces comment requirement
- Deferred production calculated automatically on event creation and update
- Monthly downtime report exports correctly as Excel and PDF
- On-stream efficiency KPI updated in real time on dashboard

---

## EPIC-005: Regulatory Reporting & Submission
**Domain**: Regulatory Compliance  
**Goal**: Auto-populate, review, and submit BSEE MMS-146 and Texas RRC PR-2 reports from finalised monthly allocations, with automated deadline reminders and amendment versioning, eliminating manual regulatory form preparation.  
**Scope**:
  - In: BSEE MMS-146 auto-population (April 2025 schema), SFTP submission to eFAST portal, Texas RRC PR-2 generation (schema v3.2) via RRC REST API, report locking after submission, versioned amendments, 10-day and 3-day email deadline reminders
  - Out: State-level reporting beyond BSEE and Texas RRC, revenue royalty calculations  
**Priority**: Critical  
**Effort**: L (34–55 pts)  
**BRD References**: FR-018, FR-019, FR-020, FR-021, WF-006, BR-014, BR-019  
**Definition of Done**:
- MMS-146 generated correctly from finalized allocations; SFTP upload confirmed
- RRC PR-2 generated and submitted via OAuth2 REST API
- Reports locked on submission; amendments versioned
- Automated email reminders sent at 10-day and 3-day marks

---

## EPIC-006: Production Dashboards & Analytics
**Domain**: Production Analytics  
**Goal**: Provide production engineers and leadership with real-time KPI dashboards, anomaly alerts (over-rate, high WC, GOR breach), and well-level decline curve views so that underperforming wells are identified within 30 minutes of anomaly occurrence.  
**Scope**:
  - In: Real-time KPI dashboard (total production, OSE, top 5 wells, well status counts), production anomaly detection and alert workflows (BR-001/002/003), decline curve overlay (type curve vs actual), chart/CSV export
  - Out: Predictive maintenance, economics/forecasting, reservoir simulation  
**Priority**: High  
**Effort**: L (34–55 pts)  
**BRD References**: FR-022, FR-023, FR-024, WF-008, BR-001, BR-002, BR-003, NFR-001, BO-004  
**Definition of Done**:
- Dashboard KPIs refresh within 10 seconds of page open (NFR-001)
- Anomaly alerts generated within 30 minutes of threshold breach (BO-004)
- Decline curve displays historical production vs type curve with correct axes
- PNG and CSV export functional for all dashboard panels

---

## EPIC-007: Platform Foundation — Security, Audit & Administration
**Domain**: Platform / Cross-Cutting  
**Goal**: Provide a secure, auditable foundation for the entire platform: Azure AD SSO with 7-role RBAC, a 7-year compliant audit trail for every production data change, and administrative tools for well master data, user management, and system integrations.  
**Scope**:
  - In: Azure AD SAML 2.0 SSO, 7 RBAC roles with asset scope filtering, immutable audit log (PostgreSQL hot 2yr → Blob cold 7yr), well master data management, type curve import, system integration configuration, user role assignment
  - Out: Identity provider configuration (handled by IT Ops in AAD), SAP/PI provisioning  
**Priority**: Critical  
**Effort**: M (13–21 pts)  
**BRD References**: NFR-004, NFR-005, NFR-006, NFR-007, NFR-008, NFR-009  
**Definition of Done**:
- All users authenticate only via Azure AD; no local accounts exist
- All 7 roles enforced; asset-scope filtering working per clarification Q-C4
- Every production/allocation data change captured in audit log with user, timestamp, old/new values
- System Administrator can manage wells, users, roles, and integration settings
- Audit log query returns records for past 2 years; cold archive retrievable by admin
